requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — SEC Certification and Chilean Type-L Plug (220V / 50Hz)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——SEC认证及智利L型插头（220V / 50Hz）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——SEC認證及智利L型插頭（220V / 50Hz）

summary.en: Electrical safety for listed product categories in Chile is regulated by the SEC (Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles). SEC-listed products (including power adaptors, chargers, and certain consumer electronics) must be certified against NCh standards harmonising IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1 and bear the Chilean SEC seal. Chile's power system is 220V/50Hz. The principal socket type is Type L — a 3-pin round plug at 70° angle (uniquely Chilean; not interchangeable with Italian, EU Schuko, or Australian plugs), with Type C also commonly accepted. Products sold with power cords must use or adapt to the Chilean Type-L plug. CCC certification is not recognised by SEC.
summary.zh: 在列出产品类别中，智利的电气安全由SEC（电力和燃料监督局）监管。SEC列明产品（包括电源适配器、充电器及特定消费电子产品）须依据协调IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1的NCh标准进行认证并贴附智利SEC印章。智利电网为220V/50Hz。主要插座类型为L型——3圆孔70°夹角（智利独有；与意大利、欧洲Schuko或澳大利亚插头不可互换），C型也常被接受。随产品销售的电源线须使用或适配智利L型插头。SEC不承认CCC认证。
summary.zht: 在列出產品類別中，智利的電氣安全由SEC（電力和燃料監督局）監管。SEC列明產品（包括電源轉接器、充電器及特定消費電子產品）須依據協調IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1的NCh標準進行認證並貼附智利SEC印章。智利電網為220V/50Hz。主要插座類型為L型——3圓孔70°夾角（智利獨有；與義大利、歐洲Schuko或澳大利亞插頭不可互換），C型也常被接受。隨產品銷售的電源線須使用或適配智利L型插頭。SEC不承認CCC認證。

standards_or_laws: NCh standards harmonising IEC 62368-1 (audio/video, IT and communications equipment safety)
NCh standards harmonising IEC 60950-1 (legacy IT equipment safety)
SEC Resolution on listed electrical product certification (Chile) — SEC seal required
Chilean Type-L plug standard — 3-pin round at 70° (uniquely Chilean)

summary.en: China requires CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for listed electrical and IT equipment, tested against GB 4943.1 (harmonised with IEC 60950-1) or GB/T 62368.1 (harmonised with IEC 62368-1). CCC covers electrical safety for the Chinese 220V/50Hz market with Chinese flat-pin plugs (Type A/I). CCC is not recognised by Chilean SEC; plug type must separately comply with the Chilean Type-L requirement.
summary.zh: 中国对列出的电气和信息技术设备要求CCC（中国强制认证），依据GB 4943.1（协调IEC 60950-1）或GB/T 62368.1（协调IEC 62368-1）进行测试。CCC覆盖中国220V/50Hz市场的电气安全，使用中国平脚插头（A/I型）。CCC不被智利SEC承认；插头类型须另行符合智利L型要求。
summary.zht: 中國對列出的電氣和資訊技術裝置要求CCC（中國強制認證），依據GB 4943.1（協調IEC 60950-1）或GB/T 62368.1（協調IEC 62368-1）進行測試。CCC涵蓋中國220V/50Hz市場的電氣安全，使用中國平腳插頭（A/I型）。CCC不被智利SEC承認；插頭類型須另行符合智利L型要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of information technology equipment (IEC 60950-1 harmonised, China CCC)
GB/T 62368.1 — Audio/video, IT and communications equipment safety (IEC 62368-1 harmonised, China)

gap.en: CCC is not recognised by Chilean SEC; separate SEC electrical safety certification against NCh/IEC standards is required for listed product categories. The Chilean Type-L plug (3-pin round at 70°) is unique and distinct from Chinese, Italian, EU Schuko, or Australian plugs — power cords and adapters must be adapted accordingly. Chile uses 220V/50Hz (same voltage as China), so voltage adaptation is generally not required, but plug adaptation remains mandatory. The Chilean SEC seal must be obtained and displayed on listed products before import and sale.
gap.zh: CCC不被智利SEC承认；对列出产品类别须另行取得符合NCh/IEC标准的SEC电气安全认证。智利L型插头（3圆孔70°夹角）独特，不同于中国、意大利、欧洲Schuko或澳大利亚插头——须相应适配电源线和适配器。智利采用220V/50Hz（电压与中国相同），通常无需电压适配，但插头适配为强制要求。进口和销售列出电气产品前须取得智利SEC印章并在产品上展示。
gap.zht: CCC不被智利SEC承認；對列出產品類別須另行取得符合NCh/IEC標準的SEC電氣安全認證。智利L型插頭（3圓孔70°夾角）獨特，不同於中國、義大利、歐洲Schuko或澳大利亞插頭——須相應適配電源線和轉接器。智利採用220V/50Hz（電壓與中國相同），通常無需電壓適配，但插頭適配為強制要求。進口和銷售列出電氣產品前須取得智利SEC印章並在產品上展示。

source.publisher: SEC — Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (Chile)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SEC electrical safety certification is mandatory for listed product categories in Chile. Chinese CCC certification is not recognised; SEC-specific certification against NCh/IEC harmonised standards and the Chilean SEC seal are required. The unique Chilean Type-L plug (3-pin round at 70°) must be used for products sold with power cords — it is not interchangeable with any other international plug standard.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于智利列出产品类别，SEC电气安全认证为强制要求。中国CCC认证不被承认；须取得针对NCh/IEC协调标准的SEC专项认证及智利SEC印章。随电源线销售的产品须使用独特的智利L型插头（3圆孔70°夹角）——该插头与任何其他国际插头标准不可互换。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於智利列出產品類別，SEC電氣安全認證為強制要求。中國CCC認證不被承認；須取得針對NCh/IEC協調標準的SEC專項認證及智利SEC印章。隨電源線銷售的產品須使用獨特的智利L型插頭（3圓孔70°夾角）——該插頭與任何其他國際插頭標準不可互換。
